raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Federal law prohibits fees for initial VA claims.",
    "Unaccredited actors continue to exploit veterans by charging exorbitant fees for services veterans can receive for free.",
    "The bill SB 694 strengthens state protections to ensure veterans are safeguarded from predatory practices.",

    "AB 1508 extends the work of the Governor’s Military Council through 2031.",
    "The Governor’s Military Council supports local partnerships and advocates for quality-of-life issues for military families.",
